content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Found 2 fix-now issues in nearby-context generation. The production path over-requires successful detail refreshes, which drops all foreign-milestone related-work items and can also hide valid sibling/related entries on transient `br show` failures.

## Amendments

1. finding_summary: `project create-from-bead` never renders foreign-milestone `related_work` entries in real prompts. The production path always runs `build_nearby_bead_context_with_detail_refresh` (`src/cli/project.rs:431-435`), and that refresh resolves every nearby candidate through `load_bead_detail` using the active milestone prefix (`src/cli/project.rs:1690-1750`, `2172-2187`). `select_matching_bead_from_show_response` rejects any qualified ID outside that milestone (`src/cli/project.rs:1784-1835`), and render-time filtering hides sibling/related entries that lack a refreshed detail row (`src/cli/project.rs:3336-3344`). As a result, a label-overlap bead like `other-ms.bead-3` is covered by the test-only builder helper but disappears from the actual generated prompt, so reviewers never see that nearby owner.
affected_files:
- src/cli/project.rs:431-435
- src/cli/project.rs:1690-1750
- src/cli/project.rs:1784-1835
- src/cli/project.rs:2172-2187
- src/cli/project.rs:3336-3344
remediation_hint: Do not require an active-milestone `br show` hit before rendering `related_work`; either resolve the candidate by its own prefix or fall back to the summary data that already contains title/status/description.
   Rationale: This breaks a central part of the new Nearby work feature for cross-milestone label-overlap beads, which are explicitly expected elsewhere in the branch.
2. finding_summary: A transient `br show` failure silently deletes sibling/related nearby context instead of falling back to the already-loaded summary. Real prompt generation enables `require_detail_for_entries` (`src/cli/project.rs:1891-1894`), `collect_nearby_detail_result` records any error as `unavailable` (`src/cli/project.rs:2199-2215`), and `nearby_candidate_status_is_omitted_with_policy` then suppresses every sibling/related bead without a detail row (`src/cli/project.rs:3336-3344`). Timeouts, parse failures, or other non-not-found errors therefore shrink or empty `Nearby work` nondeterministically even when `br list` already supplied enough data to render the entry, which can misroute later planned-elsewhere decisions.
affected_files:
- src/cli/project.rs:1891-1894
- src/cli/project.rs:2199-2215
- src/cli/project.rs:3336-3344
remediation_hint: Treat transient detail-refresh failures differently from definitive missing/closed results, and fall back to summary rendering when the refresh does not succeed.
   Rationale: The branch currently succeeds while silently weakening the prompt on ordinary `br show` hiccups, so the new context is not robust enough to trust.
